steps.title: Calculate the value of z
steps.content:
Given that the value of $z$ is 1.18 times 100:
$$z = 1.18 \times 100 = 118$$

steps.title: Determine what percent greater z is than 100
steps.content:
To find what percent greater $z$ is than 100, calculate the difference and express it as a percent of the original value. The difference is $118 - 100 = 18$:
$$\frac{18}{100} \times 100 = 18\%$$
